programs.title: How Do They Do It? 11
programs.desc: Documentary filmmakers reveal the secrets of the production of objects and devices.They meet inventive engineers and designers whose life mission is to improve reality.

programs.title: How It's Made 26
programs.desc: In everyday life, people are surrounded by numerous objects.Few wonder how they were created.Most of them are ordinary, prosaic and uninteresting things.However, they often play an important role.

programs.title: How It's Made: Dream Cars 2
programs.desc: The hosts of the series take viewers on a trip to the fascinating world of the automotive industry.They show how dream cars were created.
